UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.sourceIp: Source IP for inbound rules only; mutually exclusive with remoteIpSet and remoteIpGroup
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.destIp: Destination IP for outbound rules only; mutually exclusive with remoteIpSet and remoteIpGroup
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.remoteIpSet: Remote IP address set; mutually exclusive with sourceIp(destIp) and remoteIpGroup
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.remoteIpGroup: Remote IP address group; mutually exclusive with sourceIp(destIp) and remoteIpSet
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.action: Allow or deny; valid values: allow, deny
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.protocol: Protocol; valid values: all, tcp, udp, icmp
